===Pokémon Evolutions===
{{MissingInfo|1|java|scope=section}}
[[File:Jupiter Evolutions.png|thumb|250px|Jupiter in [[Pokémon Evolutions]]]]
Jupiter appeared in flashbacks in ''[[PE05|The Rival]]''. She was first seen at [[Lake Acuity]], being challenged by {{ga|Barry}} as she attempted to capture {{p|Uxie}}. Her {{p|Skuntank}} easily defeated Barry's {{p|Prinplup}}, allowing her to steal Uxie. Later, she appeared alongside [[Mars]] at the [[Spear Pillar]] as [[Cyrus]]' last line of defence. Barry battled her again, this time putting up much more of a fight with his evolved {{p|Empoleon}}.

Skuntank's known moves are {{m|Smokescreen}}, {{m|Night Slash}}, and {{m|Flamethrower}}.}}
